title: cardamine flexuosa var. latifolia
intro: Cardamine flexuosa var. latifolia, commonly known as the broad-leaved bittercress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cardamine flexuosa var. latifolia are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
